languages.text: Лорд-капитан отбил{mf||а} атаку на Зарков. Источник угрозы скрывается в руинах, в которых начались раскопки по приказу Вольного Торговца. Тех самых, где обрывается след Себериана.

The Lord Captain has repelled the attack on Zarkov. The source of the threat lies in the ruins where excavations have begun on the Rogue Trader's orders. The very same ruins where Seberian's trail goes cold.
languages.original_text: Лорд-капитан отбил{mf||а} атаку на Зарков. Источник угрозы скрывается в руинах, в которых начались раскопки по приказу Вольного Торговца. Тех самых, где обрывается след Себериана.

traits.locale_text: The Lord Captain has repelled the attack on Zarkov. The source of the threat lies in the ruins where excavations have begun on the Rogue Trader's orders. The very same ruins where Seberian's trail goes cold.

The Lord Captain has repelled the attack on Zarkov. The source of the threat lies in the ruins where excavations have begun on the Rogue Trader's orders. The very same ruins where Seberian's trail goes cold.

languages.text: ザルコフの攻撃は、ロード・キャプテンによって撃退された。脅威の根源は、ルーグ・トレーダーの命令で発掘が始まった遺跡である。セベリアンの足跡が途絶えたのと同じ遺跡だ。
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has repelled the attack on Zarkov. The source of the threat lies in the ruins where excavations have begun on the Rogue Trader's orders. The very same ruins where Seberian's trail goes cold.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの攻撃は、ロード・キャプテンによって撃退された。脅威の根源は、ルーグ・トレーダーの命令で発掘が始まった遺跡である。セベリアンの足跡が途絶えたのと同じ遺跡だ。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán ha rechazado el ataque a Zarkov. El origen de la amenaza está en las ruinas en las que han comenzado excavaciones por orden de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente. Las mismas ruinas donde desaparece el rastro de Seberian.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has repelled the attack on Zarkov. The source of the threat lies in the ruins where excavations have begun on the Rogue Trader's orders. The very same ruins where Seberian's trail goes cold.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán ha rechazado el ataque a Zarkov. El origen de la amenaza está en las ruinas en las que han comenzado excavaciones por orden de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente. Las mismas ruinas donde desaparece el rastro de Seberian.

languages.text: Der Lord Captain hat den Angriff auf Zarkov abgewehrt. Der Ursprung der Bedrohung befindet sich in den Ruinen, in denen auf Befehl {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} mit Ausgrabungen begonnen wurde. In denselben Ruinen verliert sich auch Seberians Spur.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has repelled the attack on Zarkov. The source of the threat lies in the ruins where excavations have begun on the Rogue Trader's orders. The very same ruins where Seberian's trail goes cold.

traits.locale_text: Der Lord Captain hat den Angriff auf Zarkov abgewehrt. Der Ursprung der Bedrohung befindet sich in den Ruinen, in denen auf Befehl {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} mit Ausgrabungen begonnen wurde. In denselben Ruinen verliert sich auch Seberians Spur.

languages.text: {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} a repoussé l'attaque de Zarkov. La menace émanerait des ruines que {mf|le libre marchand|la libre-marchande} a ordonné de fouiller. Celles-là mêmes où s'achève la piste de Seberian.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has repelled the attack on Zarkov. The source of the threat lies in the ruins where excavations have begun on the Rogue Trader's orders. The very same ruins where Seberian's trail goes cold.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} a repoussé l'attaque de Zarkov. La menace émanerait des ruines que {mf|le libre marchand|la libre-marchande} a ordonné de fouiller. Celles-là mêmes où s'achève la piste de Seberian.

languages.text: 舰长大人已击退针对扎尔科夫的袭击。威胁的源头正是来自于行商浪人下令发掘的那片遗迹，也就是塞贝里安踪迹最终消失的地方。
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has repelled the attack on Zarkov. The source of the threat lies in the ruins where excavations have begun on the Rogue Trader's orders. The very same ruins where Seberian's trail goes cold.

traits.locale_text: 舰长大人已击退针对扎尔科夫的袭击。威胁的源头正是来自于行商浪人下令发掘的那片遗迹，也就是塞贝里安踪迹最终消失的地方。

languages.text: Lord Kaptan, Zarkov'a yapılan saldırıyı püskürttü. Tehdidin kaynağı, Hür Tacir'in emriyle kazıların başladığı harabelerde yatıyor. Seberian'ın izinin kaybedildiği harabelerin ta kendisinde.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has repelled the attack on Zarkov. The source of the threat lies in the ruins where excavations have begun on the Rogue Trader's orders. The very same ruins where Seberian's trail goes cold.

traits.locale_text: Lord Kaptan, Zarkov'a yapılan saldırıyı püskürttü. Tehdidin kaynağı, Hür Tacir'in emriyle kazıların başladığı harabelerde yatıyor. Seberian'ın izinin kaybedildiği harabelerin ta kendisinde.
